tool_args.label: Forecasting methodology reverted to pre-pandemic approach

tool_args.label: MTA to begin issuing bonds against congestion pricing after collecting data for about a year
tool_args.raw_text: MTA wants to collect data for about a year to build out a track record. There is currently debt outstanding for congestion pricing as the MTA has issued ~$400M for the infrastructure cost in the form of short-term notes that is to be paid from eventual congestion pricing.

payload.claim_text: MTA wants to collect data for about a year to build out a track record. There is currently debt outstanding for congestion pricing as the MTA has issued ~$400M for the infrastructure cost in the form of short-term notes that is to be paid from eventual congestion pricing.
payload.description: MTA plans to issue bonds against congestion pricing revenues after one year of data collection; current $400M short-term notes outstanding for congestion pricing infrastructure

evidence_refs.source_quote: the MTA wants to collect data for about a year to build out a track record. There is currently debt outstanding for congestion pricing as the MTA has issued ~$400M for the infrastructure cost in the form of short-term notes that is to be paid from eventual congestion pricing.
